welcome: Welcome! We will register your face now.
step1_instruction: Step one. Look straight at the camera.
step2_instruction: Great! Now turn your head to the left.
step3_instruction: Perfect! Now turn your head to the right.
hold_position: Hold your position. Do not move.
turn_left: Turn your head to the left.
turn_right: Turn your head to the right.
face_not_found: Face not detected. Please point your face to the camera.
multiple_faces: Multiple faces detected. Please ensure only one face is in the camera.
quality_low: Image quality is low. Please ensure good lighting.
too_far: Too far. Please move closer to the camera.
